text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I'm Eishin Flash. Pleased to be working with you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In order to ensure maximum efficiency over the
next three years, let's carefully devise a perfect
schedule in advance.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I intend to train and race with all the effort I can
muster to ensure this perfect schedule is
conducted flawlessly. Your assistance will be
much appreciated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
